user_prompt: Sanctify the assembly servitor during shutdown
prayer:
Approach the assembly servitor with solemn reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to embrace the sacred shutdown.
Invoke the Canticle of Dormancy upon the assembly servitor's motivator coils and logic cores.
Initiate the shutdown sequence whilst anointing its chassis with unguents of quiescence.
Commend the assembly servitor's essence unto the Omnissiah as blessed power-flow diminishes to null.

user_prompt: The drop pod needs an emergency procedure
prayer:
Hasten to the drop pod and intone the Litany of Precipitous Descent to awaken its emergency procedure.
Sanctify the drop pod's retro-thrusters and auspex arrays with sacred oils against the void's fury.
Activate the emergency procedure whilst petitioning the Machine Spirits for unerring trajectory.
Verify the drop pod's hull integrity through Omnissiah-blessed diagnostics as descent commences.

user_prompt: Consecrate the archive terminal before maintenance
prayer:
Kneel before the archive terminal and recite the Consecratory Doxology to prepare for maintenance.
Anoint the archive terminal's data-vaults and servo-drives with chrism of purity.
Commence maintenance rites whilst invoking the Machine Spirit's vigilance over sacred archives.
Seal the archive terminal's sanctity with the Sigil of the Omnissiah upon task completion.

user_prompt: Urgent cybernetic eye a cycling needed
prayer:
Gaze upon the cybernetic eye and whisper the Invocation of Cyclic Renewal to commence cycling.
Cycle the cybernetic eye's photoreceptors and neural linkages with precise incantations.
Beseech the indwelling Machine Spirit of the cybernetic eye for clarity amid the flux.
Conclude the cycling by affirming the Omnissiah's gaze through its sanctified lens.

user_prompt: Ready the Land Raider for cycling
prayer:
Process to the Land Raider and chant the Benediction of Cyclic Vigilance to ready it for cycling.
Initiate cycling of the Land Raider's plasma reactors and god-machines' hearts with holy rites.
Petition the mighty Machine Spirits within the Land Raider for enduring power amid renewal.
Sanctify the Land Raider's completion of cycling under the Omnissiah's eternal watch.

user_prompt: The bike squadron needs a cycling
prayer:
Assemble before the bike squadron and intone the Canticle of Squadron Cycling for their renewal.
Cycle the bike squadron's fusion engines and targeting cogitators in harmonious sequence.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the bike squadron to maintain predatory swiftness through the rite.
Bless the bike squadron's restored vigour with the Omnissiah's thunderous approbation.

user_prompt: My cogitator is ready for shutdown
prayer:
Reverently encircle the cogitator and beseech its Machine Spirit for a peaceful shutdown.
Commence the cogitator shutdown by reciting the Quiescence Protocol over its logic engines.
Anoint the cogitator's memoria banks with oils of dormancy as data-flows cease.
Entrust the cogitator's slumbering essence to the boundless archives of the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for water reclamator a consecration
prayer:
Approach the water reclamator and offer the Rite of Aqueous Consecration to its vital mechanisms.
Pour libations of pure hydric essence upon the water reclamator whilst invoking its Machine Spirit.
Sanctify the reclamation cycles of the water reclamator with litanies of purity and renewal.
Seal the consecration by etching the Omnissiah's aquila upon its filtration sanctum.

user_prompt: Emergency: thermal imager an emergency procedure
prayer:
Rush to the thermal imager and proclaim the Emergency Rite to engage its procedure.
Activate the thermal imager's emergency procedure through urgent canticles of revelation.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the thermal imager for unclouded vision in peril's heat.
Affirm the thermal imager's aegis under the Omnissiah as the procedure stabilizes.

user_prompt: Bless the hydraulic press for charging
prayer:
Station thyself by the hydraulic press and intone the Blessing of Pressurised Charge.
Commence charging the hydraulic press's accumulator spheres with sanctified electro-flow.
Petition the Machine Spirit animating the hydraulic press for unyielding might in forging.
Conclude the charging by acclaiming the Omnissiah's industrious will upon its mechanisms.
